title: Sea Creeps
description: Sea Creeps have swam into Modrinth! The ocean just got explosive...
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2cc0fc75cec7a041c94959db48070da92d0cdfa.png)

![gunpowder guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afa67802ab03532132d80f166c90529792ff2588.png)
![gunpowder guide pic](https://i.imgur.com/RLNMdXP.png)
![tnttext](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81344a40db908dc7e30ea2d013d3758f85812a42.png)
![tnt guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4164501e16552d7e210c8574364413581db46876.png)

Sea creeps is a mod that adds a water dwelling subspecies of creepers. Inspired by the mod "Aquacreepers" it adds a alternative to getting gunpowder, and 3 new types of tnt, giving the ocean a new danger and spicing up the vanilla experience with a new challenge. There are three new types of gunpowder you can obtain from sea creeps. All sea creeps spawn locations are in images descriptions. Sea Creeps are scared of cats and axolotl. This gives a new use for these mobs. This mod also includes 12 decor blocks (heads and trophys) This mod also has compatability with Biomes O Plenty and Alex Caves. The three new tnts are Wet Tnt, Frozen Tnt, and Scorched Tnt. Wet tnt places a layer of water for a few seconds and is half as explosive as normal tnt. Frozen tnt places a small wall of Packed ice. Scorched tnt is a stronger version of regular tnt. All sea creeps have a chance to drop their heads which can be crafted into wall mount trophys! Fisherman villagers sell wet and frozen gunpowder. More Coming Soon!
